title: Add --ignore option to podman artifact rm.
body:
### Feature request description

A clear and concise description of what the feature request is about.

Allow users to ignore removing artifacts errors  when removing them if they do not exist.

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

Add --ignore option, just like podman image rm ignore

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

Yes check if it exists before removing, but this is racy.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
